source.name: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence

resources.description: Monitors compromised payment cards ingested from PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence: exposure over time, affected companies, card brands, ticket status, and validity (expired vs still-valid).

properties.description: PaymentCardExposed_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

Identifies a new PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence ticket that exposes a
compromised payment card belonging to the monitored company. These typically originate
from card breaches, skimmers, or infostealer infections and indicate that a payment card
may be available to fraudsters. The full card number is never stored — only the BIN,
last 4 digits, brand, and length are retained. Investigate the exposure and, where the
card is your own, coordinate reissue with the issuing bank.
properties.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created > ago(1h)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Created,
    TicketId,
    CompanyName,
    CardBrand,
    CardBin,
    CardLast4,
    CardMasked,
    CardLength,
    ExpirationDate,
    Status

properties.description: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence Analytics Rule 1

source.name: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence

properties.description:
Identifies a new PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence ticket that exposes a
payment card whose expiration date is still in the future. A non-expired card is
immediately usable for fraudulent transactions and is therefore higher risk than an
already-expired card. The full card number is never stored — only the BIN, last 4 digits,
brand, and length are retained. Prioritize reissue of the affected card with the issuing
bank and monitor for fraudulent activity.
properties.displayName: PRODAFT USTA - Non-expired payment card exposed
properties.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where Created > ago(1h)
| where ExpirationDate > now()
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Created,
    TicketId,
    CompanyName,
    CardBrand,
    CardBin,
    CardLast4,
    CardMasked,
    CardLength,
    ExpirationDate,
    Status

properties.description: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence Analytics Rule 2

source.name: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence

properties.displayName: PRODAFT USTA - Non-expired payment card exposed
PRODAFT USTA - Payment card exposure by company
properties.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| summarize
    Cards = count(),
    NonExpired = countif(ExpirationDate > now()),
    Brands = make_set(CardBrand, 25),
    FirstSeen = min(Created),
    LastSeen = max(Created)
    by CompanyName
| sort by Cards desc

tags.name: description
tags.value:
Summarizes compromised payment card exposure from PRODAFT USTA PCFI tickets, grouped by
company. Shows still-valid (non-expired) card counts and card brands to help spot
payment card fraud exposure affecting your organization.

properties.description: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence Hunting Query 1

connectorUiConfig.title: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence data connector ingests compromised payment-card tickets from the PRODAFT USTA platform into Microsoft Sentinel. Sensitive values are redacted at ingestion: the full card number (PAN) is never stored — only the BIN (first 6), the last 4 digits, the card brand, and the length are retained for triage.

sampleQueries.query:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards
| where isnotempty(CardBrand)
| summarize Count = count() by CardBrand
| sort by Count desc

dataTypes.name: PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: PRODAFT USTA API key
customs.description: A long-lived PRODAFT USTA API key with access to the Payment Card Fraud Intelligence endpoint is required.

instructionSteps.title: Connect PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Enter your USTA base URL and a long-lived API key, then select Connect. The connector authenticates to USTA with the `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>` header and polls every minute. To load history from before the connection time, deploy the **PRODAFTUstaPCFI-Backfill** playbook shipped with this solution.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend c = content, co = company | extend n = tostring(c.number) | project TimeGenerated = now(), TicketId = tolong(id), Status = tostring(status), StatusTimestamp = todatetime(status_timestamp), Created = todatetime(created), ContentType = tostring(content_type), CompanyId = toint(co.id), CompanyName = tostring(co.name), CardBin = iff(strlen(n) >= 6, substring(n, 0, 6), ''), CardLast4 = iff(strlen(n) >= 4, substring(n, strlen(n) - 4, 4), n), CardMasked = strcat(iff(strlen(n) >= 6, substring(n, 0, 6), ''), '******', iff(strlen(n) >= 4, substring(n, strlen(n) - 4, 4), n)), CardBrand = case(substring(n, 0, 1) == '4', 'Visa', toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) >= 51 and toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) <= 55, 'Mastercard', toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) >= 22 and toint(substring(n, 0, 2)) <= 27, 'Mastercard', substring(n, 0, 2) == '34' or substring(n, 0, 2) == '37', 'Amex', substring(n, 0, 4) == '6011' or substring(n, 0, 2) == '65', 'Discover', substring(n, 0, 2) == '36' or substring(n, 0, 2) == '38', 'Diners Club', 'Other'), CardLength = toint(strlen(n)), ExpirationDate = todatetime(c.expiration_date)

schema.name: PRODAFTUstaCompromisedCards_CL
schema.description: PRODAFT USTA Payment Card Fraud Intelligence - compromised payment cards (PAN redacted). TimeGenerated reflects ingestion time; Created and StatusTimestamp carry the true event time reported by USTA. Only BIN (first 6), last 4 digits, brand, and length of the card number are retained.

metadata.description: Name of the Logic App playbook.
Logs-ingestion URI of the connector's Data Collection Endpoint, e.g. https://<dce-name>-a1b2.westeurope-1.ingest.monitor.azure.com
Immutable ID of the connector's Data Collection Rule, e.g. dcr-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
Number of days of history to backfill.

source.name: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence

metadata.title: PRODAFTUstaPCFI-Backfill
metadata.description: On-demand backfill playbook for PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence. Pages through the USTA credit-card API and pushes historical tickets to the connector's Data Collection Endpoint (Logs Ingestion API), so the same DCR transform (PAN redaction, field mapping) is applied as for live polling. The codeless connector only polls forward from connection time; run this playbook once after connecting to load history.
prerequisites: The PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence solution installed and its data connector connected (this creates the DCE, DCR, and table).
The Data Collection Endpoint logs-ingestion URI and the DCR immutable ID (see readme.md for how to find them).
A PRODAFT USTA long-lived API key.
postDeployment: Grant the playbook's system-assigned managed identity the 'Monitoring Metrics Publisher' role on the connector's Data Collection Rule, then run the trigger once (see readme.md).

properties.displayName: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence
properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence solution ingests compromised payment cards from the PRODAFT USTA platform into Microsoft Sentinel via a codeless (Codeless Connector Framework) data connector. The full card number (PAN) is dropped at ingestion — only the BIN (first 6), the last 4 digits, the card brand, and the length are retained for triage. Includes analytic rules to alert on newly exposed payment cards and on non-expired (still-usable) exposed cards, a hunting query, an overview workbook, and an on-demand backfill playbook for loading historical data.

Data Connectors: 1, Parsers: 1, Workbooks: 1, Analytic Rules: 2, Hunting Queries: 1, Playbooks: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions

source.name: PRODAFT USTA - Payment Card Fraud Intelligence
